evidence: turn-arbiter.ts:28-50 defines `const BACKCHANNELS = new Set([...])` with ~21 English-only tokens (yeah/yep/yup/uh huh/mhm/okay/ok/right/sure/uh/um/hmm/i see/got it/gotcha/oh). isBackchannel (52-60) lowercases, strips non-[a-z\s'-], and does an exact Set.has on the whole normalized string. In tryCommit (209-212): `if (this.latestInterimText && isBackchannel(this.latestInterimText)) { this.suppress(pending, "interrupt.suppressed_backchannel", sustainedMs); return; }` — so a NON-matching interim (any non-English acknowledgment like 'si'/'vale'/'ja'/'うん') returns false, skips suppression, and COMMITS a barge-in (cuts off agent TTS). Kimi's phrasing 'non-English backchannels ... may suppress real interruptions' inverts the mechanism: the actual failure is a FALSE barge-in (suppression that should fire doesn't), not suppression of a real interruption. Confirmed English-only + no locale config: voice-text.ts:93 already threads `locale?: string | string[]` into the segmenter, but no locale is plumbed into the backchannel filter (grep shows zero locale references in turn-arbiter.ts). It is genuinely hardcoded English. Severity is lower than medium because backchannel suppression is the 3rd of 3 stacked guards in tryCommit: min-duration (196), primary-speaker gate (199), low-confidence <0.5 (205), THEN backchannel (209). On English it works (tests at turn-arbiter.test.ts:290/354 prove both directions). Impact is non-English-deployment UX degradation (spurious barge-ins on acks), not a correctness/security/crash defect, and it is partly mitigated by the confidence + duration guards.
real_fix: Make the backchannel list locale-configurable rather than a module-level English-only const. Thread a `locale` (or `backchannels?: ReadonlySet<string>`) option through TurnArbiterDeps (turn-arbiter.ts:62-67), default to the existing English set, and select/merge a locale-specific set inside isBackchannel keyed on the session locale already available to the segmenter (voice-text.ts:93). Minimum viable: add common non-English short acks for the deployment's configured locale(s); do NOT add an ML classifier (over-engineered for a defense-in-depth heuristic that is one of three guards). Keep the exact-match normalization. Files: packages/voice/src/turn-arbiter.ts:28-67,209-212 (list + deps + gate); voice-agent-session.ts:567-585 (pass locale into noteInterimEvidence or construct arbiter with locale).
